name: io.github.JonasFuchss/x402-trust-mcp
description: Trust & reliability scores for x402 endpoints: free stats + trust preview, paid full scores.

environmentVariables.name: X402_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Base wallet private key (with or without the 0x prefix). When set, the paid tools auto-pay over x402 up to X402_MAX_USD; otherwise they return a price quote. The free tools need no key.

environmentVariables.name: X402_MAX_USD
environmentVariables.description: Per-call auto-pay ceiling in USD. 0 disables auto-pay.

environmentVariables.name: X402_MAX_TOTAL_USD
environmentVariables.description: Cumulative auto-pay cap per process in USD. 0 = unlimited.

environmentVariables.name: X402_MAX_CALLS
environmentVariables.description: Max paid calls per process. 0 = unlimited.
